name: HIJ · APPRAISAL REQUEST form → Plane work item

parameters.formDescription: Jira ProForma intake form for project HIJ (appraisal request). Captures customer name, financing amount, appraisal valuation type, submission document link, valuation object type, optional notes, and the requesting user's superior (ATASAN USER user-picker).

values.placeholder: Diisi link Google Drive/Link PDF/Ms.W (Fc. Sertifikat, PBB, IMB/PBG, BPKB)

parameters.completionMessage: =Created HIJ-{{ $('Create Plane work item').first().json.sequence_id }} · https://YOUR_PLANE_BASE/hijra/projects/PLANE_TARGET_PROJECT_ID/issues/{{ $('Create Plane work item').first().json.id }}

parameters.content:
## HIJ form → Plane
Fill the PLACEHOLDERS before enabling:
- **URL host** `YOUR_PLANE_BASE`
- **`PLANE_TARGET_PROJECT_ID`** → `e89c3f8b-5603-41af-9187-11638d1f65ce` (HIJ)
- **`YOUR_PLANE_API_KEY`** → Plane token (X-API-Key)
- workspace slug = `hijra`
- new items created in state **PERMINTAAN MASUK** (`3548318b-6eb9-496d-b86b-d249c61015d6`)
- auto-labels: business-form, business-form-93

### Assignee dropdown (snapshot of Plane members)
Dropdown shows friendly labels; the Code node's MEMBER_MAP resolves the choice
to a member UUID (hit → assignee; miss → captured in the description). Add BOTH a
dropdown option AND a MEMBER_MAP entry (identical strings) as people sign up:
- `Danny Dwi Cahyono (dcahyono@hijra.id)` → `f799f9fe-ed67-427c-8e51-199de6cd54a6`

### Manual / needs attention
- ATASAN USER is a Jira user-picker (person field) with no n8n equivalent; rebuild as a member-snapshot dropdown sourced from Plane project members and refresh as people join — maps to the work-item assignee
